creator: marcel@herrbischoff.com
text:
On 13.2-RELEASE-p5 with GENERIC kernel.

When using fish shell, selecting view 5 or 6 results in:

fish: Job 1, 'pftop' terminated by signal SIGBUS (Misaligned address error)

When using built-in sh:

Bus error (core dumped)

The core dump is available when required.
